name: BLT Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Canadian bacon, cut into thin strips
2 medium-sized potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch chunks (2 cups)
1 cup fresh, frozen or canned corn kernels
4 cups coarsely shredded romaine lettuce or other crisp lettuce
1 large ripe tomato, coarsely chopped (1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large, preferably non-stick saucepan over medium-high heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
2. Add 3 cups of the milk, potatoes, onion, salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk 1/2 cup of the remaining milk with flour until blended. Stir this mixture into the soup along with the remaining 1/2 cup of milk and corn. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
4. Add romaine and tomatoes and cook 1 minute longer, or until lettuce is wilted. Makes 8 1/2 cups.
